feature_tested: Analytics Engine Expanded - 17 Reports across 7 Categories with Advanced Visualizations
summary: All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all 17 reports with new visualizations: Revenue Heatmap (day x hour grid), Daypart Analysis (4 dayparts), Category Mix (stacked area trends), Speed of Service, Guest Analytics (party sizes, covers trend), Outlet Comparison (Radar Chart), Waste & Variance Analysis, AI Revenue Forecast (confidence bands), Menu Engineering (Scatter Plot Quadrant), Prime Cost (Waterfall Chart). All reports navigable through sidebar categories. Export CSV buttons present.

endpoints: GET /api/analytics/heatmap - Returns 126 cells (7 days x 18 hours) with day_idx, hour, revenue, intensity
GET /api/analytics/daypart - Returns 4 dayparts (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Late Night) with revenue, covers, avg_check
GET /api/analytics/category-mix - Returns categories with revenue, mix_pct, fc_pct, and 14-day trend
GET /api/analytics/speed-of-service - Returns overall_avg_mins (37.1), by_hour (18 entries), by_day (7 entries), by_outlet
GET /api/analytics/guest-analytics - Returns party_size_distribution (5 buckets), server_covers, covers_trend (14d)
GET /api/analytics/outlet-comparison - Returns outlets with revenue, avg_check, fc_pct, tip_pct, items_per_cover
GET /api/analytics/waste-variance - Returns theoretical_cost, actual_cogs, variance, variance_pct, waste_breakdown
GET /api/analytics/forecast - Returns 7-day forecast with predicted, confidence_low/high, method=sma7_trend_seasonal
GET /api/analytics/home - Returns KPIs (today_revenue, covers, avg_check, sdlw, wtd, mtd, labor_pct)
GET /api/analytics/sales-by-hour - Returns hourly breakdown (6:00-23:00), peak_hour
GET /api/analytics/sales-by-item - Returns items with revenue, food_cost, margin, fc_pct
GET /api/analytics/sales-vs-labor - Returns 14-day sales vs labor comparison
GET /api/analytics/menu-engineering - Returns items classified as star/plowhorse/puzzle/dog
GET /api/analytics/prime-cost - Returns COGS, labor, prime_cost_pct, target 65%
GET /api/analytics/server-performance - Returns server stats (revenue, covers, tips)
GET /api/analytics/daily-comparison - Returns this_week vs last_week comparison
GET /api/analytics/sales-trend - Returns trend data by outlet/category/item
GET /api/analytics/reports - Returns 6 categories with 17 total reports
Heatmap intensity normalization (0-1 scale)
Daypart revenue sums to total_revenue
Category mix percentages sum to ~100%
Forecast confidence bands (low < predicted < high, ~15% band)

verified_elements: App loads successfully without errors
Analytics BI switcher button visible (data-testid='analytics-mode-switcher')
Analytics Engine panel loads (data-testid='analytics-engine')
Report navigation sidebar with 7 categories (data-testid='analytics-report-nav')
Analytics Home shows 6 KPI cards with sparklines
Revenue Heatmap renders day x hour grid with intensity coloring and legend
Daypart Analysis shows 4 daypart cards (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Late Night)
Category Mix shows pie chart and 14-day stacked area trend
Speed of Service shows overall avg (37.1 min), hourly and daily charts
Guest Insights shows party size distribution, covers trend, server table
Outlet Comparison shows Radar/Spider chart with multi-outlet overlay
Waste & Variance shows theoretical vs actual by category chart
AI Forecast shows actual vs forecast line chart with confidence band
Menu Engineering shows Scatter Plot Quadrant (Popularity vs Margin %)
Prime Cost shows Waterfall Chart (Revenue to Profit flow)
Export CSV buttons present on reports
All 17 reports navigable through sidebar categories
Dark theme applied consistently
Charts use recharts library (BarChart, LineChart, AreaChart, PieChart, ScatterChart, RadarChart)
Data tables have proper styling with hover effects

critical_code_review_comments: All 17 analytics endpoints correctly implemented with proper data aggregation
Heatmap correctly generates 126 cells (7 days x 18 hours) with normalized intensity
Daypart analysis correctly categorizes transactions into 4 time periods
Speed of Service estimates ticket time from item count when opened_at unavailable
Forecast uses SMA7 + trend + day-of-week seasonality with 15% confidence bands
Radar chart correctly normalizes metrics to 0-100 scale for multi-outlet comparison
Scatter plot correctly plots items by popularity (qty) vs margin percentage
Waterfall chart correctly shows revenue breakdown to gross profit
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Analytics data from POS simulation (2713 transactions, 30 days)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 68 Analytics Engine expanded features working correctly. 17 backend endpoints tested and passing. Frontend Analytics BI panel accessible via sidebar switcher. New visualizations verified: Heatmap (126 cells), Daypart (4 periods), Category Mix (stacked area), Speed of Service, Guest Analytics (party sizes), Outlet Comparison (Radar chart), Waste & Variance, AI Forecast (confidence bands), Menu Engineering (Scatter plot), Prime Cost (Waterfall). Previous iteration 67 had 10 reports, now expanded to 17 reports across 7 categories.
